item.title: Leaf Reader 1.4.12
item.description:
• Improved first-load performance and kept compatibility with existing saved reading data.
  • Added a loading overlay that waits for initial AI bubbles before opening the document.
  • Reduced AI bubble startup work with recent-first restore and on-demand historical bubble loading.
  • Tightened AI explanation spacing and removed extra blank lines between original text and translation.
  • Improved PDF scroll paging and reduced window-resize stutter.
